title: Privacy Policy
description: This page explains the basic privacy posture for this static Kilordle site.

sections.title: Information We Collect
paragraphs: The game can run in your browser without requiring an account. The static pages do not ask you to submit personal information.
The page template includes third-party analytics and advertising scripts. Those providers may collect usage information according to their own policies.

sections.title: How Information Is Used
paragraphs: Usage information can help understand site traffic, diagnose problems, and improve the player experience.

sections.title: Your Choices
paragraphs: You can use browser settings, content blockers, or privacy tools to limit cookies, analytics, and advertising scripts.
